scripts.build: pnpm --filter @conference/design-system build && pnpm --filter @conference/dsl-runtime build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @conference/design-system build && pnpm --filter @conference/dsl-runtime build && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @conference/design-system build && pnpm --filter @conference/dsl-runtime build && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @conference/design-system build && pnpm --filter @conference/dsl-runtime build && tsx src/__tests__/render-governor.spec.ts
